items.annotation: TestCase respecting the BDD template with the execution template attached.

Set-up of test:
Bring the application in a desired state
- Login
- Navigate to a specific page

Run the STR (Steps To Reproduce) of the test:
- Actual test steps

Verify output and results:
- Check if the STR (Steps To Reproduce) had the desired effect
- Final Asserts
- Determine final test PASS/FAIL criteria
